title: Removal of designees
doc_html:
§1408.  Removal of designees

Until such time as the persons designated as emergency interim successors are authorized to exercise the powers and discharge the duties of an office in accordance with this Part, including R.S. 33:1407, said persons shall serve in their designated capacities at the pleasure of the designating authority and may be removed or replaced by said designating authority at any time, with or without cause.

Acts 1963, No. 114, §8.
